extortioner is at an end/spoiler ceaseth/oppressors are consumed. Isa. 16:4-5 is a messianic prophecy. The newly restored kingdom of David removes oppression and destruction; the Messiah sits on the throne (16:5), a symbol of kingship (Donald W. Parry, Jay A. Parry, and Tina M. Peterson, Understanding Isaiah [Salt Lake City: Deseret Book Co., 1998], 162.)

he shall come to his sanctuary. Worshipers shall seek comfort from their idols at their temples, but the Lord's word will be fulfilled; Moab's devastation will be complete.

And the Word of the Lord hath taken away.
